steps.title: Square both sides and solve for $w$
Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• A: $w = \sqrt{\frac{x}{y}} - 22$ — took a square root instead of squaring.
  • B: $w = \sqrt{\frac{24x}{12y}} - 22$ — same error and failed to simplify/divide by 2.
  • C: $w = \left(\frac{x}{y}\right)^2 - 22$ — matches the derivation.
  • D: $w = \left(\frac{24x}{12y}\right)^2 - 22$ — forgot to divide by 2; $\frac{24x}{12y} = \frac{2x}{y}$, not $\frac{x}{y}$.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
